channel.title: Agents on Marc Dougherty
channel.description: Recent content in Agents on Marc Dougherty

item.title: AI Agent anatomy -- my mental model
item.description:
AI agents seem to be everywhere these days, but I’ve found fairly little discussion about the mental models that help us build agents. This post discusses the mental model I use to think about agentic systems, and how this model allows me to think critically about agentic systems.

Agent Anatomy
#

The first real definition I heard for an Agent came from Simon Willison:
